name: Fiddlehead and Ham Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 and 1/2 cups Ham, cooked and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a white sauce by combining butter, flour, milk, and salt in a saucepan over medium heat until well blended.
2. Stir in parsley and chives to the sauce.
3. In a casserole dish, alternate layers of ham, cooked fiddleheads, and white sauce until the dish is filled, ending with a layer of sauce.
4. Sprinkle buttered crumbs evenly over the top of the casserole.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes or until the sauce bubbles and the crumbs are browned.
